system.requirement: Your hawk can aid you while it is aloft.

abilities.description: Far-Seeing: When you @Compendium[starforged-custom-oracles.starforgedcustommoves.Item.ed490d43a2533506]{Journey}, @Compendium[starforged-custom-oracles.starforgedcustommoves.Item.3ff03b51f620ab26]{Undertake an Expedition}, or hunt small game to @Compendium[starforged-custom-oracles.starforgedcustommoves.Item.703964b8d02355b8]{Resupply}, add +1.

Fierce: When you @Compendium[starforged-custom-oracles.starforgedcustommoves.Item.a2d7793b23c17489]{Secure an Advantage} or @Compendium[starforged-custom-oracles.starforgedcustommoves.Item.3f5a834fa3fea5d1]{Gain Ground} +edge using your hawk to harass and distract your foes, add +1 and take +1 momentum on a hit.

Vigiliant: When you @Compendium[starforged-custom-oracles.starforgedcustommoves.Item.e6ed148eff82c171]{Face Danger}} +wits to detect an approaching threat, or when you @Compendium[starforged-custom-oracles.starforgedcustommoves.Item.2f2ba4090b22a122]{Enter the Fray} +wits against an ambush, add +2.
